member.name: T:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.ProfileFactory
member.summary: An utility class to help the creation of new post-processing profile assets.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.ProfileFactory.CreatePostProcessProfileAtPath(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a post-processing profile asset at the given location.
member.param: The path to use relative to the project folder

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.ProfileFactory.CreatePostProcessProfile(UnityEngine.SceneManagement.Scene,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a post-processing profile asset and automatically put it in a sub folder next to the given scene.
member.param: A scene
A name for the new profile

member.name: T:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.BaseEditor`1
member.summary: Small wrapper on top of to ease the access of the underlying component and its serialized fields.
member.typeparam: The type of the target component to make an editor for

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.BaseEditor`1.m_Target
member.summary: The target component.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.BaseEditor`1.FindProperty``1(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,``0}})
member.summary: Find a serialized property using an expression instead of a string. This is safer as it helps avoiding typos and make code refactoring easier.
member.param: The expression to parse to reach the property
member.returns: A or null if none was found

member.name: T:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.EffectListEditor
member.summary: This class is used to draw the user interface in the inspector for all the settings contained in a .

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.EffectListEditor.asset
member.summary: A reference to the being displayed by this editor.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.EffectListEditor.#ctor(UnityEditor.Editor)
member.summary: Creates a new instance to be used inside an existing .
member.param: A reference to the parent editor instance.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.EffectListEditor.Init(UnityEngine.Rendering.PostProcessing.PostProcessProfile,UnityEditor.SerializedObject)
member.summary: Initializes the editor. This method should be called before is called.
member.param: A reference to the that will be displayed.
A of the given instance.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.EffectListEditor.Clear
member.summary: This method should be called when the editor is destroyed or disabled.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.EffectListEditor.OnGUI
member.summary: Draws the settings for the referenced in the editor.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.EditorUtilities
member.summary: A set of editor utilities used in post-processing editors.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.EditorUtilities.isTargetingConsoles
member.summary: Returns true if the current target is a console, false otherwise.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.EditorUtilities.isTargetingMobiles
member.summary: Returns true if the current target is a mobile, false otherwise.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.EditorUtilities.isTargetingAndroid
member.summary: Returns true if the current target is Android, false otherwise.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.EditorUtilities.isTargetingOpenGLES
member.summary: Returns true if the current build targets OpenGLES, false otherwise.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.EditorUtilities.isTargetingWebGL
member.summary: Returns true if the current target is WebGL, false otherwise.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.EditorUtilities.isTargetingConsolesOrMobiles
member.summary: Returns true if the current target is a console or a mobile, false otherwise.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.EditorUtilities.GetContent(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a for the given label and tooltip. These are recycled internally and help reduce the garbage collector pressure in the editor.
member.param: The label and tooltip separated by a | character

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.EditorUtilities.DrawFixMeBox(System.String,System.Action)
member.summary: Draws a UI box with a description and a "Fix Me" button next to it.
member.param: The description
The action to execute when the button is clicked

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.EditorUtilities.DrawSplitter
member.summary: Draws a horizontal split line.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.EditorUtilities.DrawOverrideCheckbox(UnityEngine.Rect,UnityEditor.SerializedProperty)
member.summary: Draws a toggle using the "override checkbox" style.
member.param: The position and size of the toggle
The override state property for the toggle

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.EditorUtilities.DrawHeaderLabel(System.String)
member.summary: Draws a header label.
member.param: The label to display as a header

member.name: T:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.PostProcessEffectEditor`1
member.summary: The class to inherit from when designing custom effect editors.
member.typeparam: The effect type to create an editor for

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.PostProcessEffectEditor`1.FindProperty``1(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,``0}})
member.summary: Find a serialized property using an expression instead of a string. This is safer as it helps avoiding typos and make code refactoring easier.
member.param: The expression to parse to reach the property
member.returns: A or null if none was found
member.remarks: If you're trying to retrieve a , you should use instead.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.PostProcessEffectEditor`1.FindParameterOverride``1(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{`0,``0}})
member.summary: Find a serialized parameter override using an expression instead of a string. This is safer as it helps avoiding typos and make code refactoring easier.
member.param: The expression to parse to reach the parameter override
member.returns: A or null if none was found

member.name: T:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.DefaultPostProcessEffectEditor
member.summary: A default effect editor that gathers all parameters and list them vertically in the inspector.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.DefaultPostProcessEffectEditor.OnEnable
member.summary: Called when the editor is initialized.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.DefaultPostProcessEffectEditor.OnInspectorGUI
member.summary: Called every time the inspector is being redrawn. This is where you should add your UI drawing code.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.DecoratorAttribute
member.summary: Tells a class which inspector attribute it's a decorator for.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.DecoratorAttribute.attributeType
member.summary: The attribute type that this decorator can inspect.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.DecoratorAttribute.#ctor(System.Type)
member.summary: Creates a new attribute.
member.param: The type that this decorator can inspect

member.name: T:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.PostProcessEffectBaseEditor
member.summary: The base class for all post-processing effect related editors. If you want to customize the look of a custom post-processing effect, inherit from instead.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.PostProcessEffectBaseEditor.Repaint
member.summary: Repaints the inspector.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.PostProcessEffectBaseEditor.OnEnable
member.summary: Called when the editor is initialized.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.PostProcessEffectBaseEditor.OnDisable
member.summary: Called when the editor is de-initialized.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.PostProcessEffectBaseEditor.OnInspectorGUI
member.summary: Called every time the inspector is being redrawn. This is where you should add your UI drawing code.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.PostProcessEffectBaseEditor.GetDisplayTitle
member.summary: Returns the label to use as the effect title. You can override this to return a custom label, else it will use the effect type as the title.
member.returns: The label to use as the effect title

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.PostProcessEffectBaseEditor.PropertyField(UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.SerializedParameterOverride)
member.summary: Draws a property UI element.
member.param: The property to draw

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.PostProcessEffectBaseEditor.PropertyField(UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.SerializedParameterOverride,UnityEngine.GUIContent)
member.summary: Draws a property UI element with a custom title and/or tooltip.
member.param: The property to draw
A custom title and/or tooltip

member.name: T:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.SerializedParameterOverride
member.summary: A wrapper used for serialization and easy access to the underlying property and override state.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.SerializedParameterOverride.overrideState
member.summary: The override state property of the serialized parameter.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.SerializedParameterOverride.value
member.summary: The value property of the serialized parameter.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.SerializedParameterOverride.attributes
member.summary: An array of all attributes set on the original parameter.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.SerializedParameterOverride.displayName
member.summary: Returns the display name of the property.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.SerializedParameterOverride.GetAttribute``1
member.summary: Gets the attribute of type T from the original parameter.
member.typeparam: The type of attribute to look for
member.returns: And attribute or type T, or null if none has been found

member.name: T:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.AttributeDecorator
member.summary: The base abstract class for all attribute decorators.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.AttributeDecorator.IsAutoProperty
member.summary: Override this and return false if you want to customize the override checkbox position, else it'll automatically draw it and put the property content in a horizontal scope.
member.returns: true if the override checkbox should be automatically put next to the property, false if it uses a custom position

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.AttributeDecorator.OnGUI(UnityEditor.SerializedProperty,UnityEditor.SerializedProperty,UnityEngine.GUIContent,System.Attribute)
member.summary: The rendering method called for the custom GUI.
member.param: The property to draw the UI for
The override checkbox property
The title and tooltip for the property
A reference to the property attribute set on the original field
member.returns: true if the property UI got rendered successfully, false to fallback on the default editor UI for this property

member.name: T:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.PostProcessEditorAttribute
member.summary: Tells a class which run-time type it's an editor for. When you make a custom editor for an effect, you need put this attribute on the editor class.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.PostProcessEditorAttribute.settingsType
member.summary: The type that this editor can edit.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.PostProcessEditorAttribute.#ctor(System.Type)
member.summary: Creates a new attribute.
member.param: The type that this editor can edit

member.name: T:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.Styling
member.summary: Common styles used for Post-processing editor controls.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.Styling.smallTickbox
member.summary: Style for the override checkbox.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.Styling.miniLabelButton
member.summary: Style for the labels in the toolbar of each effect.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.Styling.splitter
member.summary: Color of UI splitters.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.Styling.paneOptionsIcon
member.summary: Option icon used in effect headers.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.Styling.headerLabel
member.summary: Style for effect header labels.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.Styling.headerBackground
member.summary: Color of effect header backgrounds.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.Styling.wheelLabel
member.summary: Style for the trackball labels.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.Styling.wheelThumb
member.summary: Style for the trackball cursors.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.Styling.wheelThumbSize
member.summary: Size of the trackball cursors.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Rendering.PostProcessing.Styling.preLabel
member.summary: Style for the curve editor position info.
